seo.title: State of Direct Hotel Distribution | Wink Research
seo.metaDescription: How hotels create, control and convert demand across direct, OTA, social, partner, Booking Engine and AI-discovery channels. Wink research.
seo.ogDescription: Wink tracks how hotels create, control, and convert demand across direct booking, OTAs, social channels, Partners, Booking Engine flows, embedded commerce, and AI discovery.

cards.title: Developers

items.question: What is direct hotel distribution?
items.answer: Direct hotel distribution is the set of channels and booking paths where a hotel can attract, convert, and retain guest demand with more control over the offer, data, and relationship.

items.question: Is the report anti-OTA?
items.answer: No. The report should explain where OTAs help, where dependence becomes expensive, and how hotels can build a stronger direct-demand mix.

items.question: Is the full report published?
items.answer: Yes - the landing page is live with cited external market context from named sources. Wink's own survey findings, charts, and primary percentages publish once data collection and review are complete.

items.question: Who is the report for?
items.answer: It is for hotel owners, commercial leaders, marketers, revenue teams, Partners, platform teams, developers, analysts, and travel media.

items.question: How does Wink fit into the report?
items.answer: Wink is the platform layer connecting hotel supply, content, partner demand, and Booking Engine conversion - direct bookings at 5.5% all-in versus 15-25% on the OTAs, with 6-month attribution.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
